meta.title: How To Start A Short Form Content Agency in 2024 (Beginner Guide)
meta.description:
How To Start A Short Form Content Agency in 2024 (Beginner Guide)
Submagic 👉 https://bit.ly/3TabFgf (use 'DANKIEFT90' for 10% discount)
OpusClip 👉 https://bit.ly/49b8WcU

In this video I show you how to start a sfc agency as a complete beginner. I have built a short form content agency myself and I'm still running it to this day. In this video I will show you how to get clients for your short form content agency, how to do outreach, how to close your first client and I show you which tools you need to use for your short form content agency.  A short form content agency is a niche within the SMMA industry. 

Follow these 8 steps to get started with your own short form content agency.
